episodes.title: Cultlike Zizians group's alleged leader, another member arrested
episodes.description:
The apparent leader of a cultlike group known as the Zizians has been arrested in Maryland along with another member of the group, Maryland State Police said Monday. An investigation into the Zizians spans several states and led to a massive FBI search of a wooded area near Chapel Hill.
